title: Set fiscal year account wide
excerpt:
The new feature to add the start of the fiscal year to the Gantt chart was a welcome addition. It did however, create a small issue for us displaying the fiscal year. 
Our Fiscal year start in July and is reflective of t…

posts.author: ttrimble (Tyler Trimble)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new feature to add the start of the fiscal year to the Gantt chart was a welcome addition. It did however, create a small issue for us displaying the fiscal year.

Our Fiscal year start in July and is reflective of the year to come. So for example, July of 2024 is the start of FY 2025. However, after setting this on the gantt chart this still displays the year as 2024 not Q1 of FY25. This could be fixed in the gantt view with a toggle to set the FY forward.

The other option would be to have an option in the admin console to set this account wide. Where if the Gantt is viewed by quarters, it would default to the FY setting on the account. This type of Gantt is used for strategic planning so having it display the correct year and quarter is important.

posts.author: MelH (Melanie)
posts.cookedHtml:
this seems a huge omission as most software allows you to config the fiscal year. Sidekick seems to say you can do it in admin console, but where it tells you to go to to change it, you can’t. Llama Tim then suggests maybe you have wrong type of account and need Enterprise, but we are enterprise and I am the admin.
Not easily being able to get deals charts by UK (or other region) fiscal quarter is a major oversight. Please prioritise this over loads of AI stuff, as this should be a basic core feature of a CRM system.
